caption: A close-up view shows the interior of a disassembled mechanical engine casing resting on a weathered workbench. Inside the silver-colored metal housing, several interlocking gears are visible, including a large, dark circular gear at the center and smaller gears positioned above and to the right. The surrounding workspace is cluttered with various mechanical tools, including a set of blue-handled sockets in a tray, a yellow tool handle, and several metal pliers and screwdrivers scattered across the brown surface. In the background, orange components and a red storage bin are partially visible. Across the sequence of images, the scene remains static; there are no people present, and the position of the gears, tools, and equipment does not change, depicting a still moment of a mechanical assembly or repair process.
